subcodes.first_line: In this moment, when the heaven of grace hath been uplifted and the sun of loving-kindness and favors [from the horizon] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این حین روحا که سما فضل مرفوع و شمس عنایت و الطاف از افق
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
